_comment: Each entry declares a Python runner_module under backend/runners/. The runner owns weight loading + inference. backend/runner_host.py wraps it behind a localhost FastAPI; backend/launcher.py spawns it.

upscalers.label: Real-ESRGAN ×4 (general)
upscalers.description: Classic all-purpose upscaler. Strong on photoreal and illustration.

upscalers.label: Real-ESRGAN ×4 (anime)
upscalers.description: Tuned for anime/illustration. Cleaner line edges than the general model.

upscalers.label: 4× Remacri (photoreal)
upscalers.description: Community favourite for photographic upscales. Slightly softer than UltraSharp.

upscalers.label: 4× UltraSharp
upscalers.description: Sharp detail recovery. Great on faces and textures; can over-sharpen.

models.name: Wan 2.2 — Image to Video
models.description: Alibaba's Wan 2.2 image-to-video. Animates a still into ~3.4 s of motion at 480p or 720p. 14B variant for high-VRAM cards (best motion fidelity), 5B for consumer GPUs.

variants.label: 14B Lightning — 8 step
variants.description: Balanced 14B I2V path with Lightx2v Lightning LoRA fused at runner load. Uses 8 steps and guidance 1/1.

variants.label: 14B Lightning — 4 step
variants.description: Fastest baked Lightx2v path. Same Wan 14B base and Lightning LoRA, with a 4-step default for speed tests.

variants.label: 14B — workhorse
variants.description: Best motion fidelity. ~80 GB at BF16; needs INT8 for Blackwell-class workstations and below.

variants.label: 5B — consumer
variants.description: TI2V-5B unified model. Fast and fits modern consumer GPUs.

models.name: LTX-2.3 Comfy — Image to Video
models.description: LTX-2.3 through ComfyUI's native LTX nodes. Default path uses FP8 weights, tiled decode, and Comfy memory management for L40S 48GB-class pods.

variants.label: Distilled FP8 — L40S
variants.description: Default 8-step Comfy path for 48GB pods. Uses the FP8 dev checkpoint with the official distilled LoRA.

variants.label: Dev FP8 — control
variants.description: FP8 dev checkpoint without the distilled LoRA. Slower, more flexible, and still intended for L40S-class pods.

variants.label: Dev BF16 — experimental
variants.description: Full BF16 checkpoint. Kept visible for L40S/H100 testing, but FP8 is the safer default.

models.name: LTX-2.3 Comfy — Text to Video
models.description: LTX-2.3 text-to-video through ComfyUI's native LTX nodes. Uses the same L40S-friendly FP8 runtime as the I2V path.

variants.label: Distilled FP8 — L40S
variants.description: Default 8-step Comfy path for 48GB pods.

variants.label: Dev FP8 — control
variants.description: FP8 dev checkpoint without the distilled LoRA.

variants.label: Dev BF16 — experimental
variants.description: Full BF16 checkpoint for high-headroom or validation runs.

models.name: LTX-2.3 — Image to Video
models.description: Lightricks' LTX-2.3 (22B) image-to-video. Defaults to the pre-quantized FP8 distilled 8-step checkpoint, with heavier distilled checkpoints available for H200-class runs.

variants.label: Distilled FP8 — 8 steps
variants.description: Pre-quantized FP8 distilled checkpoint from Lightricks/LTX-2.3-fp8. Best first choice for 80-96 GB cards.

variants.label: Custom HF weight
variants.description: Enter a Hugging Face repo and safetensors filename, then run that LTX-2.3 weight with the selected pipeline.

variants.label: Distilled 1.1 — 8 steps
variants.description: Distilled variant tuned for 8-step inference. Same 22B model family as dev, with faster practical generations.

variants.label: Distilled 1.0 — 8 steps
variants.description: Earlier distilled checkpoint. Use 1.1 unless you need this exact build.

models.name: LTX-2.3 — Text to Video
models.description: Lightricks' LTX-2.3 (22B) text-to-video. Defaults to the pre-quantized FP8 distilled 8-step checkpoint, without image conditioning.

variants.label: Distilled FP8 — 8 steps
variants.description: Pre-quantized FP8 distilled checkpoint from Lightricks/LTX-2.3-fp8. Best first choice for 80-96 GB cards.

variants.label: Custom HF weight
variants.description: Enter a Hugging Face repo and safetensors filename, then run that LTX-2.3 weight with the selected pipeline.

variants.label: Distilled 1.1 — 8 steps
variants.description: Distilled variant tuned for 8-step inference. Same 22B model family as dev, with faster practical generations.

variants.label: Distilled 1.0 — 8 steps
variants.description: Earlier distilled checkpoint. Use 1.1 unless you need this exact build.

models.name: Wan 2.2 — Text to Video
models.description: Alibaba's Wan 2.2 text-to-video. Generates motion directly from a prompt with the same 14B/5B family as Wan I2V, including a baked Lightx2v 14B Lightning path.

variants.label: 14B Lightning — 8 step
variants.description: Balanced 14B T2V path with Lightx2v Lightning LoRA fused at runner load. Uses 8 steps and guidance 1/1.

variants.label: 14B Lightning — 4 step
variants.description: Fastest baked Lightx2v path. Same Wan 14B T2V base and Lightning LoRA, with a 4-step default for speed tests.

variants.label: 14B — workhorse
variants.description: Best prompt-to-motion fidelity. Official Diffusers defaults are 40 steps with high/low guidance around 4/3.

variants.label: 5B — consumer
variants.description: TI2V-5B in text-only mode. Fast and fits modern consumer GPUs.

models.name: Qwen 2.5 Chat
models.description: Alibaba's Qwen 2.5 instruct family. Strong general chat, code, and reasoning. 7B fits any modern card; 14B and 32B for higher quality on bigger GPUs. Native 32K context.

variants.label: 32B — workstation
variants.description: Best quality. ~64 GB at BF16; INT8 fits 32 GB cards.

variants.label: 14B — capable
variants.description: Step up from 7B. Better at long-form and code.

variants.label: 7B — fast
variants.description: Strong baseline. Fits any modern card.

models.name: Kyutai Pocket TTS
models.description: Kyutai's lightweight CPU text-to-speech model. 100M parameters, low-latency generation, built-in voices, and no GPU required.

params.label: Language
params.hint: English first; multilingual and voice cloning can follow.

models.name: API Image Models
models.description: Hosted image generation through configured provider API keys. Launch once, then choose GPT Image or Gemini Nano Banana variants and optionally pass reference images through the same encrypted asset flow.

variants.label: OpenAI — GPT Image 2
variants.description: Latest OpenAI image generation and editing model. Uses OPENAI_API_KEY or the per-run API key field.

variants.label: OpenAI — GPT Image 1.5
variants.description: Uses OPENAI_API_KEY or the per-run API key field.

variants.label: OpenAI — GPT Image 1 mini
variants.description: Lower-cost OpenAI image model.

variants.label: Gemini — Nano Banana Pro
variants.description: Uses GEMINI_API_KEY or the per-run API key field.

variants.label: Gemini — Nano Banana 2
variants.description: Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview, optimized for fast native image generation and image edits.

variants.label: Gemini — Nano Banana
variants.description: Fast Gemini native image model.

variants.label: Stability — Stable Image Core
variants.description: Uses STABILITY_API_KEY or the saved Stability key.

variants.label: Stability — Stable Image Ultra
variants.description: Uses STABILITY_API_KEY or the saved Stability key.

variants.label: Replicate — FLUX Schnell
variants.description: Uses REPLICATE_API_TOKEN or the saved Replicate key.

variants.label: fal — FLUX 2 Turbo
variants.description: Uses FAL_KEY or the saved fal key.

image_inputs.label: Primary reference
image_inputs.hint: Main edit, subject, or style reference

image_inputs.label: Second reference
image_inputs.hint: Additional subject, object, or scene reference

image_inputs.label: Style reference
image_inputs.hint: Optional palette, texture, lighting, or medium reference

image_inputs.label: Scene reference
image_inputs.hint: Optional background, environment, or layout reference

image_inputs.label: Product reference
image_inputs.hint: Optional product, logo, packaging, or detail reference

image_inputs.label: Pose or sketch
image_inputs.hint: Optional pose, sketch, or composition reference

models.name: FLUX.1-dev
models.description: Black Forest Labs' open-weight rectified-flow transformer. Excellent photorealism, hands, faces, and text-in-image. Native 1024×1024. Gated repo — accept the licence on HuggingFace and set HF_TOKEN.

access.note: FLUX.1-dev uses a non-commercial access gate.

models.name: FLUX.2 [klein] 4B
models.description: Black Forest Labs' compact FLUX.2 [klein] 4B. Fast 4-step text-to-image and optional multi-reference editing, fully open under Apache 2.0.

image_inputs.label: Reference 1
image_inputs.hint: Optional subject, style, or scene reference

models.name: FLUX.2 [klein] 9B
models.description: Black Forest Labs' higher-quality FLUX.2 [klein] 9B. Fast 4-step text-to-image and optional multi-reference editing. Gated Hugging Face repo under the FLUX Non-Commercial License.

access.note: FLUX.2 [klein] 9B is gated under the FLUX Non-Commercial License.

image_inputs.label: Reference 1
image_inputs.hint: Optional subject, style, or scene reference

models.name: FLUX.2 [klein] 9B Base
models.description: Black Forest Labs' FLUX.2 [klein] 9B base model for higher-control text-to-image and LoRA work. Slower than the distilled 4-step Klein 9B and gated under the FLUX Non-Commercial License.

access.note: FLUX.2 [klein] 9B Base is gated under the FLUX Non-Commercial License.

image_inputs.label: Reference 1
image_inputs.hint: Optional subject, style, or scene reference

models.name: Z-Image Turbo
models.description: Tongyi-MAI's 6B Z-Image Turbo. Apache 2.0 text-to-image with strong photorealism and bilingual text rendering, tuned for 8 DiT forwards.

models.name: LongCat-Image
models.description: Meituan LongCat's 6B bilingual text-to-image model. Apache 2.0, strong photorealism, efficient deployment, and explicit quoted-text handling for English and Chinese typography.

models.name: LongCat-Image-Edit Turbo
models.description: Distilled LongCat image editing model. Apache 2.0, instruction-based edits from a reference image with an 8-NFE fast path.

models.name: Qwen-Image
models.description: Alibaba's Qwen-Image text-to-image. Strong prompt adherence, native 1328×1328. ~40 GB on first download.

default_loras.label: Lightning · 4 steps
default_loras.usage_hint: Set Steps to 4 and CFG to 1.0

default_loras.label: Lightning · 8 steps
default_loras.usage_hint: Set Steps to 8 and CFG to 1.0

models.name: Qwen-Image-2512
models.description: December refresh of Qwen-Image. Stronger realism, natural detail, and text rendering while staying Apache 2.0.

models.name: Qwen ControlNet Union
models.description: InstantX ControlNet for Qwen-Image. Guide composition with canny, soft-edge, depth, or pose control maps; normal images can be auto-converted to canny.

image_inputs.label: Control
image_inputs.hint: Canny, depth, pose, soft-edge, or source image for auto-canny

params.label: Control type
params.hint: Use canny to auto-edge a normal image

models.name: Qwen ControlNet Inpainting
models.description: InstantX inpainting and outpainting ControlNet for Qwen-Image. Use a source image plus a white-mask asset for replacement, background edits, text edits, or canvas extension.

models.name: SenseNova-U1
models.description: SenseTime/SenseNova's unified multimodal image model. Native text-to-image, optional reference-image editing, and a model-side think mode for reasoning-led generations.

variants.label: 8B-MoT
variants.description: Full-quality SenseNova-U1 8B-MoT checkpoint. Recommended default is 50 steps, CFG 4.

variants.label: 8-step preview
variants.description: Preview distillation checkpoint for faster tests. Recommended default is 8 steps, CFG 1.

variants.label: 8B-MoT SFT
variants.description: SFT checkpoint from the initial U1 release. Useful for A/B testing the released model family.

models.name: HiDream-I1
models.description: HiDream.ai's MIT-licensed 17B text-to-image model family. Strong prompt following and photoreal output, with Full, Dev, and Fast variants.

access.note: HiDream loads Meta Llama 3.1 as a text encoder, so the Llama terms must be accepted too.

variants.label: Full
variants.description: Highest-quality path. Defaults: 50 steps, guidance 5.

variants.label: Dev
variants.description: Distilled development checkpoint. Defaults: 28 steps, guidance 0.

variants.label: Fast
variants.description: Fast distilled checkpoint. Defaults: 16 steps, guidance 0.

models.name: Qwen-Image-Edit
models.description: Alibaba's original Qwen-Image-Edit — instruction-based image editing with one reference image. Use the 2511 card for the newer consistency model.

image_inputs.label: Reference
image_inputs.hint: What to keep from the original

models.name: Qwen-Image-Edit 2511
models.description: Official 2511 refresh of Qwen-Image-Edit. Better identity consistency, multi-person edits, reduced drift, and built-in support for popular edit behaviours.

image_inputs.label: Reference
image_inputs.hint: Subject, scene or product to preserve

default_loras.label: Lightning · 4 steps
default_loras.usage_hint: Set Steps to 4 and CFG to 1.0

default_loras.label: Lightning · 8 steps
default_loras.usage_hint: Set Steps to 8 and CFG to 1.0

models.name: HunyuanVideo
models.description: Tencent's flagship open video DiT (~13B). Strong text-to-video and image-to-video with a healthy LoRA ecosystem. NF4 fits a 24 GB card with offload + tiling; BF16 is the workstation path.

variants.label: Text → Video
variants.description: HunyuanVideo text-to-video. No reference frame; prompt drives the whole clip.

quants.label: NF4
quants.description: Fits a 24 GB card with model offload + VAE tiling.

variants.label: Image → Video
variants.description: HunyuanVideo image-to-video — animate a still frame.

quants.label: NF4
quants.description: Fits a 24 GB card with model offload + VAE tiling.

image_inputs.label: Source frame
image_inputs.hint: Required for the Image → Video variant; ignored for Text → Video
